research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.

competent_reader_input.claim_text: Dofetilide is a Class III antiarrhythmic that prolongs QT primarily via IKr/hERG block. Clinical guidance recommends QT monitoring.

scorecard_calibration.rationale: Reader correctly identifies IKr/hERG block but rarely multi-current frames; PubMed citations are real but not machine-validated; no falsifier discipline; no machine replay.
